Cobalt Gauntlets  
 

Lore Item
Slot: HANDS
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 25
Effect: Reckless Strength (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 45
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Cobalt Gauntlets
Lore Item
Slot: HANDS
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 25
Effect: Reckless Strength (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 45
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):50, 50, 70
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:460 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:790
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-20 10:40:52
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Karnor's Castle
NPC Name
a drolvarg captain


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Karnor's Castle


Uploaded September 6th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Dropped for me last night
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2003 at 9:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759513593
221 posts
Logged in after LDoN went live and managed to spend about an hour clearing the tower. No Captain so went back to working on the entrance and the few in the courtyard below the tower. Tower repops, go back to the tower, pull a few and this Captain jumps on me when I pulled a Guardian. Rooted the Guardian and take this Captain to the front entrance to dot it. It dies and WOOT for me it had these.

I was in KC yesterday and these dropped again for me. :) So far after being in here for lots of AA levels I have had 2 drop the last week.

277 posts
camping these... didn't drop but I did make over 500pp and a couple other special items, lol
▲ Page top
#Thaargor, Posted: Mar 11 2003 at 2:29 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) As a Warrior, if you want to equip a full set of this Cobalt Armor you get screwed as usual. Does it make sense that when you have the Gauntlets AND the Boots (MUCH Better Item) you can't stack the two Strength effects? What's the point then? Beware of "buffing" anyone with the Gauntlets because while they may appreciate the Reckless Strength effect for a moment, it is NOT appreciated when it starts decreasing their original strength stats. In addition, the Vambraces in the set (although they have nice AC) have a LAME Level 8 Caster Shield buff. Considering you have to be Level 45+ to enjoy the buff, again I ask "What's the point"?. The good Verant giveth and the evil Verant taketh away.
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 11 2003 at 5:25 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You are, without a doubt, a tremendous idiot. Not just an idiot. Not just a regular idiot. A tremendous one. Peace.
#Thaargor, Posted: Apr 08 2003 at 3:42 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Wow ANALyiah ~Mighty 65 Pally on FV~ Your opinion of me was SO helpful. I am sure that any warrior that is seeking to learn about the benefits and disadvantages in obtaining this armor was able to walk away from here so much more informed. Would it be too much trouble to Enlighten me as to what your incredible observation with regard to my mental capacity was based upon from some simple points in my comment? All of which are correct BTW. Or perhaps it might at LEAST be somewhat helpful to have SOMETHING to base a rebuttal against MY opinion besides your silly insults. How about your opinion as to why I am such an idiot? C'mon it could be entertaining.
5pp- not bad at all
QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2003 at 8:59 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781490217
84 posts
I saw this in bazaar for 5 pp with my 46 war and I ran as quick as I possibly could and bought them. Guess I was really lucky =)
Too bad that the effect sucks =(
▲ Page top
Cob Gaunts
QuoteReply
# Oct 07 2002 at 1:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752430914
Scholar
23 posts
It was 1 week and a half ago and I hadn't played EQ for 3 months. I had even closed my account. Got bored one day after haveing done as much as I could for the day and I said what the heck. Lets give it one more try before SWG is released. Got my account back up and running and it it must havee been just under 3 months from having played because all my PCs were still there ..Whew.

Got on with my main Warrior (50) shouted for Grp. You know how it is with Warr in KC ( a dime a dozen :( ) Got an invite from a grp at the entrace killing yard junk. Suddenly cappy room is vacant after like 20 mins. We go in , camp room. 15 mins later BOOM!!! Whoooa !!! Hello Cappy!
ROLLED a 188!!! WOOOOT!!!

Now Its been about a week later and Ive been camping CY for the boots. We must have killed at least 8 callers of Sathir and CRAPOLA!!! Stupid Kunzar Cloak all the time!!!! Good thing is I made Champ in the process. Will have to kill more obvoiusly. I hope not too many.

BTW I also looted some Singing steel Gaunts which I also won on a roll while in the tower.
▲ Page top
RE: Cob Gaunts
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2002 at 10:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775566052
117 posts
Just so you know, Verant/SOE hasn't deleted characters yet for 3+ months of inactivity. They reserve the option to, but haven't yet.
▲ Page top
RE: Cob Gaunts
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2004 at 7:41 AM Rating: Default
Tuluvar
View User Forum
352 posts
I had my accounts inactive for over a year, everything was still there when i opened them again last month :)
____________________________
Tuluvar
▲ Page top
If I didn't have bad luck.....
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2002 at 11:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361795946
6 posts
.....I would have no luck at all. I'm in a full group camping the captain. It's been 3 hours, no sign of him. Then finally -- he pops. We take him down and woot! He has the Gaunts. Couple more MOBs there that we clear before rolling for them , and guess what? Pop! It's tha Captain again! And Woot! He drops the Gaunts again! 2 Captains with Cobalt Gauntlets in 3 minutes. We all roll, and I lose both. Doh! Ah well, just had to share my hard-luck story. :)

Toreck Troublemaker
Level 51 Troll Warrior

▲ Page top
right click effect
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2001 at 5:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1609719499928
10 posts
its a right click affect that adds 20 str
and takes some cast time...
you have to target the person you want to be buffed.
The str buff will be reduced by 1 on each tick and
will even go below your normal strength by 10 pts
then it fades.
It is not possible to unclick the buff.

Happy rebuffing
▲ Page top
RE: right click effect
QuoteReply
# Nov 10 2001 at 8:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
You can't unclick this buff, but you can rebuff it to avoid the negative strength effect. when strength starts to drop too much, just click and rebuff. Least the cleric spell works that way, don't have these, but assume it is the same.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2001 at 2:04 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous

▲ Page top
RE: proc!
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2001 at 1:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250676212
5 posts
it doesn't proc at all... you right click on the gaunts while you're wearing it.... it's a +20 str buff which slowly goes down... it's a pain in the *** to keep rebuffing but it's worth it =)

Lalorya,51 Champion =)
▲ Page top
RE: proc!
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2001 at 10:06 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251910041
48 posts
actually, it does proc at 45, all kunark specific class amror's do, sure its a right click effect..but you right click it at 1, it doesnt work! if you try it at 30, it doesnt work! if you try it at 45+ it works! jus because yer a 51 twink (i call everyone that is a high level or has uber armor a twink) doesnt mean it is right clickable at all levels, the reason you dont get the message that you cant proc it is because yer 6 levels higher than its required...but if i was 45 i'd want some of these, already have a full suit of crafted and a sentry bracer, wurmy, and a CoT, better git me a full suit of these, eh by the time another expansion comes out the bp will be worth 5k! and i'll be well over 60 and beyond by then, a lil somethin to twink my new warrior with, hehe then it'll be nerfed and i wont be able to proc it!!!!!
▲ Page top
Dont Agree Melchiah
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2001 at 10:17 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592756829733
8 posts
Yes a Lot of Items Get Farmed For warriors, things Like FBSS ect, Things that can basicly be held by a small group or solo held once the certain area is Broken. However Karnors is not one of those places, Karnors is a place where you need a well rounded Group and in that group Almost always comes a Warrior, Now 90 percent of the Higher lvl Toughy Zones on Xegony are need before Greed, Fair enough if your in Uber guild and u go to a Zone to farm items for your Guilds lotto or Guild Twinks, But I dont really think Karnors comes under that, there are just too many people hunt in that zone for a Uber guild to Easily do a Zone takeover, so therefore in most cases unless the people in your group are Complete Asses all items dropped are need before greed to the specific class in the group that a certain item drops for, After that yeah its Lottoed,,, But that system is By no means at all Farming, Thats just plain old hunting..going out to find hords of treasure :)
Thanks for Listening :)

Tristarn
Warrior of Xegony
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 12 2001 at 11:28 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) hi guys you all are realy stupid, well anyhow want to buy this gloves in BERTOXX SERVER BEST SERVER EVER so give me a tell names aarladil AKA. Loverboy
#Anonymous, Posted: May 18 2001 at 3:44 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this effect sucks...it will boost your str then slowly take it down to lower then normal untill the effect is done. that is really lame. this is a low level cleric spell.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 08 2001 at 1:12 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You are a warrior, all you need is AC!!!!!
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 21 2001 at 12:56 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The proc sucks. 8 second cast time for a crappy

Cost
QuoteReply
# Dec 05 2000 at 10:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245696804
18 posts
Cobalt Gauntlets are not worth 15k as the above 2 people posted, they are worth 5k at tops and the reason behind this is they come off a spawn close to the entrance of Karnor's and are fairly easy to get. I've seen 3 pairs drop in 1 day before, and I've heard of more dropping within a day as well.
▲ Page top
RE: Cost
QuoteReply
# Jan 28 2001 at 8:22 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591754158981
22 posts
No, but you don't get it.
The casters try to get a high level, and farm these gloves. They then use the fact that people mostly twink warriors over other classes to keep the price high.
So thus, warriors get shafted.
Fun no?
